case_title: MARTA ABREGO SALMERON VS. CURRY SENIOR CENTER

DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAVID KNEGO, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
